goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(f, x, k0, eps) }
continuous_condition(f, x, delta, eps) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_close(x, delta) implies f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps) }

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta, f, eps)
continuous_condition(f, x, delta, eps)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps) } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta) and not f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps)) })
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta) and not f(x0).is_close(f(x), eps)) }(y)
not y.is_close(x, delta) or f(y).is_close(f(x), eps)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { x0(x1).abs = pointwise_abs(x0, x1) }(f, y)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real) { x0(x1).abs = pointwise_abs(x0, x1) }(f, x)

function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real -> Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Real) { not x4.is_close(x0, x1) or x2(x4).is_close(x2(x0), x3) } = continuous_condition(x2, x0, x1, x3) }(x, delta, pointwise_abs(f), eps)
not continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, delta, eps) or forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or pointwise_abs(f, x0).is_close(pointwise_abs(f, x), eps) } = true
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_close(x, delta) and not pointwise_abs(f, x0).is_close(pointwise_abs(f, x), eps)) or not continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, delta, eps) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, delta, eps) or not x0.is_close(x, delta) or pointwise_abs(f, x0).is_close(pointwise_abs(f, x), eps) })
not forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or pointwise_abs(f, x0).is_close(pointwise_abs(f, x), eps) } or continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, delta) and not pointwise_abs(f, k0).is_close(pointwise_abs(f, x), eps) } or continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_close(x, delta) and not pointwise_abs(f, k0).is_close(pointwise_abs(f, x), eps) }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_close(x, delta) and not pointwise_abs(f, w0).is_close(pointwise_abs(f, x), eps) }
w0.is_close(x, delta)
not pointwise_abs(f, w0).is_close(pointwise_abs(f, x), eps)
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_close(x, delta) or pointwise_abs(f, x0).is_close(pointwise_abs(f, x), eps) }(w0)

goal: delta.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, delta, eps)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, k0, eps) }

p.c: function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, x0, eps)) }(delta)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, x0, k0) } }
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, x0, w0) } }
w0.is_positive
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, x0, w0) } = true)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, x0, w0)) })
(forall(x0: Real) { not continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, x0, w0) or not x0.is_positive })
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, k0, x0) } }(w0)
exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, k0, w0) }
let w1: Real satisfy { w1.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, w1, w0) }
w1.is_positive
continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, w1, w0)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and continuous_condition(pointwise_abs(f), x, x0, w0)) }(w1)
function(x0: Real -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { continuous_at(x0, x1) } = continuous(x0) }(f)
(forall(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) } = true)
function(x0: Real) { continuous_at(f, x0) }(x)
exists(k0: Real) { not continuous_at(pointwise_abs(f), k0) }
let w0: Real satisfy { not continuous_at(pointwise_abs(f), w0) }
function(x0: Real) { continuous_at(pointwise_abs(f), x0) }(w0)
